datasetAgreementGeneral: This dataset contains clinical records of heart failure patients collected from a medical centre. It is provided for academic and research use only. Users must comply with all patient data protection standards.
term1: You acknowledge that this dataset is intended solely for cardiovascular and clinical research and must not be used for any commercial or unauthorised purpose.
term2: You agree not to attempt re-identification of any individuals or link this dataset with external sources in a way that compromises patient privacy.
term3: You must properly attribute the original data collectors and contributors in all publications, reports, or presentations.
term4: You accept full responsibility for ensuring the ethical use of this dataset in compliance with all applicable institutional and patient data protection regulations.
term5: You agree not to redistribute this dataset to third parties without explicit written permission from the data custodians.
